texto: If you think equality will stop the fighting, you're deluding yourself! If everyone receives the same compensation, they will stop working for it, which will lead to the weakening of our nation! The only result will be conflict born from poverty!
explicacao: Citação de Adachitoka sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “If you think equality will stop the fighting, you're deluding yourself! If everyone receives the …” articula reflexao, socialism, think em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.
